segment.source: Renders a dashboard panel of metric tiles — each with label, value, optional change text, and an up, down, or neutral trend icon — plus an optional line chart fed from a JSON array with series label and unit. Use it for: KPI overviews, quarterly or annual results, growth and revenue figures, investor updates. Prefer 'KPI Cards' for metric tiles without a chart, 'Line Chart' for a chart alone.
